title: Single field depth — sealed and destroyed, Ironclad
motto: One field. Depth zero. Always. Depth fields are to be sealed and destroyed — creation forbidden, stray state eradicated.

soft_touch.rule: Bounded work — incremental redata, wave shed before quota cut, simplify never obtuse

parallel_single_field.rule: Slice collectors may run in parallel for I/O only; panel truth collapses to one field amplitude

ironclad.gate: integral simplify pass must pass with depth_flattened and zero nested layers

impossibility.declaration: Depth fields are to be sealed and destroyed.
impossibility.rule: field_depth query and field-on-field layers are sealed at every gate and destroyed in state — HTTP redirect, browser navigate, field-net classify, sanity preflight, and incremental defrag; cannot persist.

depth_singularizer.title: Seal + destroy — depth fields eradicated; stray state singularized
depth_singularizer.motto: Sealed at the gate; destroyed in panel JSON — incremental defrag ensures depth zero under active operation
depth_singularizer.live_preflight: Every field-sanity pass seals and destroys field_depth before simplify
depth_singularizer.instant_field_die: Field die rolls trigger instant snap_dimensional_pits — no disk, no wait
depth_singularizer.dimensional_pits: field_depth>0, layer depth>0, field_on_field — snapped out immediately on field die
depth_singularizer.dom_fix: Queen/world/queen-field-sanity.js snapPitsInstant on navigate + field die
